'''jabuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headcoach|headcoach]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-b-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headcoach|headcoach]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jabuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæbihith|jæbihith]] || [[word:jæbihij|jæbihij]] || [[word:jæbihish|jæbihish]] || [[word:jæbihi|jæbihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jabubuhuth|jabubuhuth]] || [[word:jabubuhuj|jabubuhuj]] || [[word:jabubuhush|jabubuhush]] || [[word:jabubuhu|jabubuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jabuhuth|jabuhuth]] || [[word:jabuhuj|jabuhuj]] || [[word:jabuhush|jabuhush]] || [[word:jabuhu|jabuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jabufhuth|jabufhuth]] || [[word:jabufhuj|jabufhuj]] || [[word:jabufhush|jabufhush]] || [[word:jabufhuf|jabufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jabuhuthu|jabuhuthu]] || [[word:jabuhuju|jabuhuju]] || [[word:jabuhushu|jabuhushu]] || [[word:jabuhuku|jabuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jabuhuth|jabuhuth]] || [[word:jabuhuj|jabuhuj]] || [[word:jabuhush|jabuhush]] || [[word:jabuhu|jabuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jabuhuthul|jabuhuthul]] || [[word:jabuhujul|jabuhujul]] || [[word:jabuhushul|jabuhushul]] || [[word:jabuhukul|jabuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jabuhuthuthu|jabuhuthuthu]] || [[word:jabuhujuju|jabuhujuju]] || [[word:jabuhushushu|jabuhushushu]] || [[word:jabuhuku|jabuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jabuhuthun|jabuhuthun]] || [[word:jabuhujun|jabuhujun]] || [[word:jabuhushun|jabuhushun]] || [[word:jabuhukun|jabuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jabuhuthuoro|jabuhuthuoro]] || [[word:jabuhujuoro|jabuhujuoro]] || [[word:jabuhushuoro|jabuhushuoro]] || [[word:jabuhukuoro|jabuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
